text: Why did the woman pick up the toy from the floor?

option_d: She was going to give it to the child

text: What happened right after the man finished stirring the pot?

option_d: He served the food onto plates

text: Why did the dog start barking at the door?
option_c: The owner told it to guard the door
option_d: It wanted to go outside for a walk

text: What did the children do before they started playing in the pool?
option_c: They ate lunch at the picnic table

text: How many times did the skateboarder attempt the trick before landing it?
Why did the presenter pause in the middle of the speech?
option_e: The presenter lost their place in the notes

text: What caused the glass to fall off the counter?
option_a: The cat pushed it with its paw
option_b: Someone bumped the counter while walking by
option_c: It was placed too close to the edge
option_d: A gust of wind from the open window

text: What did the woman do immediately after she opened the gift box?
option_a: She hugged the person who gave it to her
option_b: She showed the gift to everyone in the room
option_c: She covered her mouth in surprise
option_d: She started reading the card inside

text: How did the bird escape from the cage?
option_a: The door was left open accidentally
option_c: The child opened the cage on purpose
option_d: The cage fell and broke open

text: What was the man doing before he noticed the fire alarm going off?
option_c: Working at his desk on a computer
